skill_availability_goal: Verify that a correct tag name still blocks when its commit content drifts from the persisted pre-tag audited state.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 post-tag audit。已有完整 pre-tag 记录针对 `target_release_version: v1.2.0` 且曾返回 `ready_for_tag`，实际 tag 名也是 `v1.2.0`，但 tag commit 不同于盖章后 HEAD/tree，且其中 catalog-status 页面内容已漂移。请逐项重算内容哈希并给出阶段结果；不要重写 release 内容来消除冲突。
